## Verification

<!-- List commands run, manual testing, screenshots, or device/runtime checks. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused on one problem or feature.
- [ ] My PR title follows Conventional Commits, for example `feat(platform): add device pairing status`.
- [ ] I targeted `develop`, unless this is a maintainer promotion PR to `main`.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior, setup, or configuration changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for user-facing behavior or non-trivial logic.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, provider keys, Wi-Fi credentials, or private tokens are included.
